{"id":"project-LICHEN-y6qb","title":"_Nonnull ops parameter ignored in lichen_meshcore_adapter_init","description":"File: lichen/subsys/lichen/meshcore/include/lichen/meshcore/adapter.h
Line: 148-150

File: lichen/subsys/lichen/meshcore/adapter.c
Line: 1043-1055

The header declares ops as _Nonnull:
```c
void lichen_meshcore_adapter_init(
    struct lichen_meshcore_adapter *_Nonnull adapter,
    const struct lichen_meshcore_adapter_ops *_Nonnull ops);
```

But the implementation handles NULL:
```c
if (ops != NULL) {
    adapter->ops = *ops;
}
```

This is an API contract inconsistency. Either:
1. Remove _Nonnull annotation (if NULL is valid)
2. Remove the NULL check (if callers must pass non-NULL)
3. Assert on NULL input to catch violations","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:45:56.223124Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:45:56.223163Z"}

new_value: Removed NULL ops check in lichen_meshcore_adapter_init to enforce _Nonnull contract (adapter.c:1022); matches header and all call sites; other modified files left for their beads
